title: Modified total RNA extraction for Heterosigma akashiwo using the Qiagen RNeasy kit
author: Monica Accerbi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.hipb4dn

steps.title: Starting material
steps.instruction: Starting material: 1 ml culture with about 400,000 cells

steps.title: To the cells add 1 ml...
steps.instruction: To the cells add 1 ml of Buffer RLT with 10 µl β-mercaptoethanol

steps.title: Centrifuge through a QIAshredder column (750...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge through a QIAshredder column (750 µl at a time) at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and collect FT (flow through) in a 5 ml tube

steps.title: To the collected FT add 2...
steps.instruction: To the collected FT add 2 ml of 70% (v/v) ethanol and mix at room temperature

steps.title: Centrifuge through a RNeasy spin column...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge through a RNeasy spin column (750 µl at a time) at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT

steps.title: Add 750 µl Buffer RW1 and...
steps.instruction: Add 750 µl Buffer RW1 and centrifuge at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT

steps.title: Wash column with 500 µl Buffer...
steps.instruction: Wash column with 500 µl Buffer RPE, centrifuge at 11,000 rpm for 1’ and discard FT

steps.title: Centrifuge once more at 11,000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge once more at 11,000 rpm for 1’ to dry the membrane and remove residual ethanol

steps.title: Elute total RNA with 15 µl...
steps.instruction: Elute total RNA with 15 µl DEPC (Diethyl pyrocarbonate) -treated H 2 O

steps.title: Total RNA yield using this method...
steps.instruction: Total RNA yield using this method is around 350 ng with 260:280 nm > 1.8

steps.title: Centrifuge the starting material at 2,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the starting material at 2,000 to 3,000 rpm for 2’ at room temperature Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in the residual liquid, about 1 ml Proceed as above, steps 1 to 9. Elute total RNA with 25-30 µl DEPC-treated H2O
